prompt:
A live temperature dashboard displayed on a laptop on a desk, showing a clean auto-refreshing chart with a moving line, a small sparkline panel, and a few circular status indicators. The UI is intentionally generic and textless—no readable labels—while nearby hardware (a small sensor probe cable and a compact microcontroller) implies the dashboard is pulling live data from a local network endpoint.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk tech workspace: soft cinematic lighting, realistic screen reflections, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the chart clear and central so it reads as “live dashboard” rather than a static screenshot.
